name: Qwen3.5-Plus
tagline: Proprietary Plus variant launched alongside the open Qwen3.
metaDescription: Qwen3.5-Plus (Alibaba (Qwen)), released 2026-02-16 — part of the Qwen-Plus (multimodal agent) line. Proprietary Plus variant launched alongside the open Qwen3.…
overview: Qwen3.5-Plus is a large language model from Alibaba (Qwen), part of the Qwen-Plus (multimodal agent) line. Released 2026-02-16. Proprietary, API-only mid-tier/multimodal sibling to Max — cheaper, and from 3.7 onward a vision-capable agent model that reads screens and drives GUIs.
What's notable in this version: Proprietary Plus variant launched alongside the open Qwen3.5 family.
